title: Avoid using pgmr:mentioned for metrics
content: Use specific predicates for metrics like accuracy or recall instead of pgmr:mentioned.

title: Keep FILTER conditions outside triple patterns
content: Use FILTER only for conditions on bound variables. Do not include conditions like pgmr:mentioned inside FILTER.
avoid: Do not write FILTER(?contribution pgmr:mentioned pgmr:accuracy).

title: Use full paths for nested fields
content: Bind parent nodes before accessing child fields. For example, use contribution -> data analysis -> machine learning.
avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when accessing nested fields.

title: Bind specific validity threats instead of using generic mentions
content: For validity threats, bind specific nodes instead of using generic mentions like pgmr:construct_validity.
avoid: Do not use generic mentions for filtering validity threats.

title: Do not use relation-like tokens as objects
content: A PGMR triple must be subject relation object. Bind a variable for named concepts instead of using pgmr:relation.

title: Use COUNT for distinct counts of contributions
content: For counting distinct contributions, use COUNT(DISTINCT ?contribution) instead of incorrect counting methods.
avoid: Do not use incorrect counting methods for distinct contributions.

title: Use FILTER for specific conditions
content: Use FILTER for specific conditions like publication year instead of incorrect predicates.
avoid: Do not use incorrect predicates for filtering conditions.

title: Avoid FILTER with multiple conditions
content: Use separate FILTER statements for each condition instead of combining them in one.
